description: Artius II Acquisition Inc. does not have significant operations. It intends to effect a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It intends to focus on technology enabled businesses that offer technology software and services, or financial services. The company was incorporated in 2024 and is based in New York, New York.
